test_cases.name: all_foreign_keys_resolve
test_cases.description: All generated foreign keys must point to records that exist.

test_cases.name: temporal_order_is_valid
test_cases.description: Policy, claim, and payment dates must follow the expected lifecycle order.

test_cases.name: fraud_flag_is_derived
test_cases.description: Fraud flag must equal whether fraud_score is greater than or equal to the configured threshold.

test_cases.name: requested_volume_is_met
test_cases.description: Generated output should match the requested base record volume.
